metadata.name: silver_orders
metadata.comment:
Cleaned order data with normalized status and cancellation flag.
View Text: (
    with source_data as (
  select *
  from `workspace`.`analytics_dev_bronze`.`bronze_orders`
)

select
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  order_timestamp,
  upper(trim(order_status)) as order_status,
  amount,
  updated_at,
  case when upper(trim(order_status)) = 'CANCELLED' then true else false end as is_cancelled
from source_data
where amount >= 0
  )
View Schema Mode: COMPENSATION
View Catalog and Namespace: workspace.analytics_dev
View Query Output Columns: [`order_id`, `customer_id`, `order_timestamp`, `order_status`, `amount`, `updated_at`, `is_cancelled`]

metadata.name: bronze_orders
metadata.comment:
Raw-to-typed bronze orders table from seed input.
View Text: (
    select
  cast(order_id as string) as order_id,
  cast(customer_id as string) as customer_id,
  cast(order_timestamp as timestamp) as order_timestamp,
  cast(order_status as string) as order_status,
  cast(amount as double) as amount,
  cast(updated_at as timestamp) as updated_at
from `workspace`.`analytics_dev_bronze`.`raw_orders`
  )
View Schema Mode: COMPENSATION
View Catalog and Namespace: workspace.analytics_dev
View Query Output Columns: [`order_id`, `customer_id`, `order_timestamp`, `order_status`, `amount`, `updated_at`]
